analysis.consistency: High. The data fields align perfectly with standard D&D 5e spell block format.
analysis.quality: High. The description is detailed, covering damage, effect (speed reduction), scaling, and classes.

mechanics.effect: Speed reduction of 10 feet until the start of the caster's next turn.
mechanics.scaling: Damage increases by 1d8 at levels 5, 11, and 17.
mechanics.components_check: V, S (Verbal, Somatic) - standard for low-level attack spells.
